history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays a chat conversation. The conversation involves messages exchanged between two individuals, indicated by different colored chat bubbles and profile pictures. One participant states, "Tidak, saya memasukkannya secara manual." (No, I'll enter it manually.) The other participant asks, "Benar sekali. Bisakah Anda memasukkan data suara dengan benar, Tuan Sorano?" (That's right. Can you enter the voice data correctly, Mr. Sorano?). The conversation continues with acknowledgments and questions about how to perform an action, followed by the reception of audio messages. One participant sends an audio message of 4 seconds, and another sends one of 2 seconds. The final message asks, "Bisakah saya menghapus nya? Sebenarnya, saya akan menghapus nya." (Can I delete it? Actually, I will delete it.) The conversation appears to be work-related or a general discussion, with no suggestive or explicit content present.
